name: Basic Repeater
description: The default starting pistol, built with deliberately modest stats and no special gimmicks. Its magazine is notably small for a repeater-style handgun, and it mainly exists to carry you through the very start of the game before better weapons begin to drop.
notes: It always spawns with fixed parts: a unique Bandit barrel, a Tediore grip, no sight, no accessory, and no elemental capacitor.
